arts.ttl: How Man United players showed support for Lisandro Martinez with emotional three-word message
arts.sum: Manchester United players showed support for Lisandro Martinez during their warm-up on the Old Trafford pitch before their FA Cup fourth-round tie against Leicester City

arts.ttl: Man United stars pay tribute to team-mate Lisandro Martinez ahead of FA Cup tie - after the defender suffered a season-ending knee injury
arts.sum: Man United players were seen warming up for their FA Cup tie against Leicester wearing t-shirts featuring the message in Spanish 'Mucha Fuerza Licha' - meaning 'Lots of strength, Licha'.

arts.ttl: Who is Hubert Graczyk? Third Arsenal academy coup on Man United bench vs Leicester City
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim names Hubert Graczyk in Manchester United matchday squad for FA Cup fourth round clash with Leicester City

arts.ttl: Manchester United stars send message to injured Lisandro Martinez before Leicester FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Man Utd players show their support for injured team-mate ahead of FA Cup tie

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea 'very keen' on Garnacho alternative
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly remain “very keen” on signing Borussia Dortmund forward Karim Adeyemi this summer. We know Chelsea are very keen on him still, but that’s not the only club of the Big Six in the Premier League with interest.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Man United face Leicester City in FA Cup 5th round
arts.sum: Tune in for live updates from Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Patrick Dorgu is making his Manchester United debut vs Leicester
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu has been named in the starting XI for Man United's FA Cup tie with Leicester City tonight.

arts.ttl: Team News: Patrick Dorgu, Ayden Heaven decisions made as Man United confirm XI for Leicester battle in FA Cup
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Friday night's FA Cup fourth-round contest with Leicester City at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Leicester: FA Cup fourth round – live
arts.sum: FA Cup fourth round, 8pm GMT kick-off at Old Trafford Live scores | Weekend FA Cup preview | And email Tim Ruud also talked about Jeremy Monga, the 15-year-old he has on the bench. “He went up to the Under-18s, did well, went up to the Under-21s and did well there too.” They grow up so fast. The game is on ITV in Britain and Ruud van Nistelrooy is chatting to the pundits. Asked if it feels odd to be at Old Trafford as the visiting manager, he reveals that he went into the home dressing-room by mistake. When he reached the away one, he didn’t much like it. “It’s tiny! And not comfortable. So they got that right.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Manchester United with Jamie Vardy missing as four changes made
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Okoli, Thomas; Ndidi, Soumare; Ayew, El Khannouss, De Cordova-Reid; Daka. And the attacking line of three behind the striker remains the same for the third game, with Jordan Ayew on the right, Bobby De Cordova-Reid on the left, and Bilal El Khannouss in the middle.
